message:
fix(web): gate test-only imports behind #[cfg(test)]; fix Rust 2024 type inference in extractors

- web.rs: Move 22 unused imports (Event, RecvError, Redactor, runtime_compat
  primitives, storage types, ui_query, Error, VERSION, json, TcpStream, Pin
  helpers, tracing macros, framework types, handler/extractor/middleware
  functions) behind #[cfg(test)] — they were only used in test code. Keep
  EventBus, StorageHandle, Result, SocketAddr, Pin, Arc, App, FrameworkWebRuntime,
  Request, Response, QueryString, StatusCode in non-test imports.
- web/extractors.rs: Add explicit closure parameter types (|v: &str|) to fix
  E0282 type inference errors in parse_limit, parse_u64, parse_i64, parse_bool
  under Rust 2024 edition.

Reduces lib warnings from 22 to 0 for the web module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
